test_name: Verify Login Access with Microsoft Integration
description: This scenario tests the user login functionality using Microsoft OAuth integration on the Roost Enterprise platform.
steps: Navigate to the login page at https://dev.roost.ai/login.
Locate and verify the presence of the Microsoft sign-in button.
Click on the Microsoft sign-in button.
Observe the redirection back to Roost Enterprise dashboard.
Verify the user is logged in by checking for user profile elements.
Log out from the Roost platform.
Ensure the user is redirected back to the login page post logout.
expected_results: Successful login redirects user to the Roost dashboard.
User session is active and profile details are visible.
edge_cases: Roost session not established post login.
dependencies: Proper OAuth configuration between Microsoft and Roost.
api_interactions: OAuth2 token exchange between Roost and Microsoft.
performance_metrics: Time taken to load Microsoft's authentication page.
Redirection speed back to Roost dashboard.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure Microsoft login button is keyboard navigable.
Verify screen reader compatibility with login page.
Check contrast ratios for login page elements.
